name: Coca-Cola FEMSA S.A.B. de C.V.R
summary: Coca-Cola FEMSA, S.A.B. de C.V., commonly known as KOF, is the largest Coca-Cola bottler in the world, distributing Coca-Cola beverages in Latin America. The company produces and distributes Coca-Cola, Sprite, Fanta, and other Coca-Cola trademark beverages, as well as other beverages like juices, water, and sports drinks. Coca-Cola FEMSA is headquartered in Mexico City, Mexico.
